headline: STERIS PLC (NYSE:STE) Passes the "Caviar Cruise" Quality Investing Screen
summary: STERIS PLC exemplifies quality investing with strong revenue growth, high capital returns, and a robust balance sheet, making it a standout for long-term portfolios.
